Roma have completed their first signing of the January transfer window, securing the services of Dutch defender Devyne Rensch from Ajax on a permanent deal. The 22-year-old right-back arrives in the Italian capital after a successful stint with the Eredivisie giants. The post OFFICIAL: Roma Sign Devyne Rensch appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Europa League | AZ Alkmaar v Roma: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: AZ Alkmaar faces a tricky challenge in their upcoming Europa League match against Roma as they will be without their top scorer in the competition. Ruben van Bommel is set to miss his third consecutive game due to injury. The team's offensive capabilities are further diminished with winger Ibrahim Sadiq joining Sem Westerveld on the injury list. arts.ttl: Roma & Napoli Accelerate Talks for Diminutive Forward
arts.sum: Roma and Napoli have reportedly intensified talks for Giacomo Raspadori's rumored switch to the Stadio Olimpico. According to Calciomercato, Claudio Ranieri's charges are keen on bringing the 24-year-old to the capital this winter.
